Event: Magic Well - July 2023
Event Date: 01/07/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: AR220


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Sentinel's Marksmanship Gear

Once in a while, when the unit's health drops below 15%, the owner of the armor and all allies around them start restoring health when attacked. The amount of health restored is equal to 10% of the max health of the unit. If a unit is at full health when attacked, their physical and magic armor are increased by 15% of the max health for 3 sec instead. Up to 3 effects.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
